signals.headline: Thunder Face Denver Rematch in Second Round | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Thunder Face Denver Rematch in Second Round | YES | HIGH confidence**

Based on final regular-season standings, the **Thunder will face the Denver Nuggets in the second round** after both teams' playoff positioning was finalized[3][5]. This represents a repeat matchup from last season, when Oklahoma City defeated Denver in seven games[3].

signals.headline: Thunder Lose Meaningless Season Finale to Suns | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Thunder Lose Meaningless Season Finale to Suns | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Phoenix Suns defeated the Thunder **135-103 on April 12**, with Jamaree Bouyea leading Phoenix's bench players[4]. This loss carries minimal playoff implications as both teams were resting key contributors in their regular-season finale[6].
